title: centrolobium robustum
intro: Centrolobium robustum, also known as the Brazil copal tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Centrolobium robustum include its use as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, attributed to its resin's ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce pain. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Centrolobium robustum include its resin, which can be extracted and used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
